_notes: AUTHORED short (not carved from LF). CORRECTED FEC figures (2026-05-30). Angle: 'A California check in a Texas hat' / '$110M tried to pick your senator.' Disguised warm-Texas names + out-of-state-billionaire money vs your one ballot. Punchline lands on the asymmetry. NO VO — text cards + music + faceless atmosphere b-roll. All money via Remotion (navy CR brand) — never an AI face of a real person.
_no_vo_note: 2026-05-24 founder lock: shorts use text + music + b-roll only. No VO. See CR-PRODUCTION-PIPELINE-v4.md Doctrine line 4.

broll.prompt: Empty polling place at dawn, rows of cardboard voting booths with privacy curtains, soft cool light through windows, a single folding chair, no people visible, faceless wide shot, civic and quiet, no on-screen wording, cinematic slow drift. Atmosphere only.

props.text: $110 million tried to pick the next U.S. senator from Texas.

props.text: The names sound like Texas. “Texans for a Conservative Majority.” “Lone Star Rising.”
